metadata.name: Kubernetes CronJob
metadata.description: Creates a Kubernetes CronJob with configurable schedule, image, command and args lists, simple environment variables, optional PVC mounting, and optional resource requests and limits.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a Kubernetes CronJob resource for recurring backups, sync jobs, maintenance tasks, and scheduled application workflows.

## Prerequisites
- Confirm the image, schedule, and any referenced ServiceAccount or PersistentVolumeClaim exist before applying the manifest.
- If the job touches external systems, make sure the target credentials and network policy are already in place.

## Apply
- Render `main.yaml`, review the schedule, command, retry behavior, and any mounted PVC, then apply it with `kubectl apply -f main.yaml`.
- Use `kubectl get cronjob <name> -n <namespace>` and `kubectl get jobs -n <namespace>` to confirm the schedule behaves as expected.

## Follow-Up
- Trigger a manual run from the rendered spec if you want to validate the job before waiting for the next schedule.
- Review logs from the created Job Pods to verify backups or maintenance steps completed successfully.

## References
- [CronJob Documentation](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/cron-jobs/)

variables.name: resource_name
variables.title: CronJob name
variables.description: Name to use for the CronJob.

variables.name: namespace
variables.title: Namespace
variables.description: Namespace for the resource.

variables.name: app_label
variables.title: App Label
variables.description: App label value used for Job Pods.

variables.name: schedule
variables.title: Schedule
variables.description: Cron expression used by the CronJob.

variables.name: suspend
variables.title: Suspend
variables.description: Suspend future scheduled runs.

variables.name: concurrency_policy
variables.title: Concurrency policy
variables.description: Policy used when a scheduled run overlaps with a previous run.

variables.name: successful_jobs_history_limit
variables.title: Successful jobs history limit
variables.description: Number of successful Job resources to retain.

variables.name: failed_jobs_history_limit
variables.title: Failed jobs history limit
variables.description: Number of failed Job resources to retain.

variables.name: backoff_limit
variables.title: Backoff limit
variables.description: Number of retries before the Job is marked failed.

variables.name: restart_policy
variables.title: Restart policy
variables.description: Restart policy used for Job Pods.

variables.name: service_account_name
variables.title: ServiceAccount Name
variables.description: ServiceAccount name for the Job Pod spec.

variables.name: ttl_seconds_after_finished_enabled
variables.title: Job TTL
variables.description: Set a TTL for finished Jobs.

variables.name: ttl_seconds_after_finished
variables.title: TTL seconds after finished
variables.description: TTL in seconds for finished Jobs.

variables.name: container_name
variables.title: Container name
variables.description: Name to use for the container.

variables.name: image
variables.title: Container image reference
variables.description: Container image used by the CronJob.

variables.name: image_pull_policy
variables.title: Image pull policy
variables.description: Policy used for image pulls.

variables.name: command_enabled
variables.title: Command
variables.description: Render a custom command list.

variables.name: command_items
variables.title: Command items
variables.description: Comma-separated command list rendered as the container command array.

variables.name: args_enabled
variables.title: Args
variables.description: Render a custom args list.

variables.name: args_items
variables.title: Args items
variables.description: Comma-separated args list rendered as the container args array.

variables.name: env_literal_enabled
variables.title: Literal Env Var
variables.description: Add one literal environment variable.

variables.name: env_literal_name
variables.title: Literal Env Name
variables.description: Literal environment variable name.

variables.name: env_literal_value
variables.title: Literal Env Value
variables.description: Literal environment variable value.

variables.name: env_secret_enabled
variables.title: Secret Env Var
variables.description: Add one secret-backed environment variable.

variables.name: env_secret_name
variables.title: Secret Env Name
variables.description: Environment variable name sourced from a Secret.

variables.name: env_secret_secret_name
variables.title: Secret resource name
variables.description: Secret name containing the value.

variables.name: env_secret_secret_key
variables.title: Secret key
variables.description: Key within the Secret containing the value.

variables.name: pvc_mount_enabled
variables.title: PersistentVolumeClaim mount
variables.description: Mount an existing PersistentVolumeClaim into the Job Pod.

variables.name: pvc_claim_name
variables.title: PersistentVolumeClaim name
variables.description: Existing claim name to mount.

variables.name: pvc_mount_path
variables.title: Mount path
variables.description: Container path where the claim is mounted.

variables.name: resources_enabled
variables.title: Resources
variables.description: Enable container resource requests and limits.

variables.name: resources_cpu_limit
variables.title: CPU limit
variables.description: CPU limit for the container.

variables.name: resources_cpu_request
variables.title: CPU request
variables.description: CPU request for the container.

variables.name: resources_memory_limit
variables.title: Memory limit
variables.description: Memory limit for the container.

variables.name: resources_memory_request
variables.title: Memory request
variables.description: Memory request for the container.
